---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, connector, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see added — a new agent, connector, dashboard tab, etc. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the expected shape of agents/connectors if you're proposing one.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Links, references, or examples that help explain the request.
